flows.title: Starting a session
flows.description: Begin from the OpenCode start screen and prepare a new conversation.

flows.title: Switching sessions
flows.description: Find an existing conversation and resume it from the session picker.

flows.title: Renaming a session
flows.description: Give the current conversation a recognizable name.

flows.title: Forking a session
flows.description: Branch an existing conversation from a selected message.

flows.title: Exporting a session
flows.description: Choose an export format and confirm the transcript was copied.

flows.title: Patch succeeds
flows.description: Watch a patch stream its input, request permission, and complete successfully.

flows.title: Foreground shell lifecycle
flows.description: Watch thinking and shell input stream before foreground commands succeed and fail.

flows.title: Project search lifecycle
flows.description: Run built-in glob and grep tools through distinct streaming, grouped, success, empty, and failure states.

flows.title: Web tool lifecycle
flows.description: Run the v2 WebFetch and WebSearch renderers with real tool calls.

flows.title: Question lifecycle
flows.description: Stream a question call, answer its form, review it, submit it, and deny a second call.

flows.title: Read file lifecycle
flows.description: Stream a read call, approve it, then observe success and denial.

flows.title: Patch file changes
flows.description: Apply real patches that create, update, and delete files, then show verification failure.

flows.title: Approving a tool call
flows.description: Review a requested operation and choose its permission scope.

steps.title: Review and approve the request
steps.trigger: Choose Allow once or Allow always

flows.title: Answering an agent question
flows.description: Respond to a structured question without leaving the conversation.

flows.title: Subagent lifecycle
flows.description: Delegate work, observe its completion, and open the child session.

flows.title: Assistant response lifecycle
flows.description: Observe assistant text while it streams, succeeds, fails, and is interrupted.

flows.title: Connecting an integration
flows.description: Choose an integration and verify its connection state.

flows.title: Managing MCP servers
flows.description: Inspect configured MCP servers and their runtime status.

flows.title: Pairing a device
flows.description: Open the pairing code used to connect another device.

flows.title: Reviewing a diff
flows.description: Inspect the working tree and verify whether files have changed.
